gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/403)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/403)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا تَتَّكِ فِي الْحَمَّامِ فَإِنَّهُ يُذِيبُ شَحْمَ الْكُلْيَتَيْنِ وَ لَا تُسَرِّحْ فِي الْحَمَّامِ فَإِنَّهُ يُرَقِّقُ الشَّعْرَ وَ لَا تَغْسِلْ رَأْسَكَ بِالطِّينِ فَإِنَّهُ يَذْهَبُ بِالْغَيْرَةِ وَ لَا تَتَدَلَّكْ بِالْخَزَفِ فَإِنَّهُ يُورِثُ الْبَرَصَ وَ لَا تَمْسَحْ وَجْهَكَ بِالْإِزَارِ فَإِنَّهُ يَذْهَبُ بِمَاءِ الْوَجْهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad Bin Bundar, from Ibrahim Bin Is’haq, from Yusuf Bin Al Sukht, raising it, said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not lean (reclining posture) in the bathhouse, for it melts the fat of the kidneys; and do not comb in the bathhouse, for it thins the hair; and do not wash your head with the clay, for it removed the self-esteem; and do not massage with the clay for it inherits the vitiligo; and do not wipe your face with the trouser for it removes the water of the face’.
en.sarwar: 23. Sahl in a marfu‘ manner has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A man must not enter a bathhouse with his son to allow him look at his private parts.’”
